subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The petition of Asad, upon him be My glory, hath been observed and hath attained unto the honor of Our hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی مطالب اسد علیه بهائی ملاحظه شد و بشرف اصغاء فائز گشت لله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for pilgrims, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
